title: hugelia virgata var. dasyantha
intro: Hugelia virgata var. dasyantha, also known as Korean gentian or Korean gentian root, is a type of plant species in the gentian family that is native to East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Hugelia virgata var. dasyantha is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
